title: blechnum whelanii
intro: Blechnum whelanii, also known as Whelan's chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Blechnum whelanii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies.
